title: Smart Nether Star Recipe
description: Minecraft mod that allows you to craft the nether star!
body:
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37af87ebbcbf221b3c3c98c1786ced660b76e066.png)
**Nether Star Recipe** provides a new crafting recipe for the coveted Nether Star, making it more accessible while maintaining game balance. This mod is perfect for players who want a reliable way to obtain Nether Stars without solely relying on defeating the Wither boss, thus opening up more possibilities for advanced crafting and beacon creation.⚙️

🧩 Features:
Craftable Nether Star: Adds a balanced and challenging crafting recipe for the Nether Star, allowing players to create it using hard-to-find resources.
Game Balance: The recipe is designed to be resource-intensive, ensuring that the Nether Star remains a valuable and significant item.
Survival Friendly: Fully functional in survival mode, enabling players to craft Nether Stars as they gather the necessary materials.![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34f6a632668700781453675cabd1076abaed7f6d_0.webp)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
